## Meeting Purpose

[To provide guidance on writing articles for Prophecy, focusing on the process, tools, and approach to create differentiated content aligned with the client's needs.](https://fathom.video/share/Forkc9HWRKC9u6urFoT7GLsXcdKzg4nr?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [The writing process involves multiple steps: research, outlining, and content enrichment using tools like Perplexity, Claude, and webinar transcripts](https://fathom.video/share/Forkc9HWRKC9u6urFoT7GLsXcdKzg4nr?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Content should be tailored to Prophecy's target audience (data platform leaders, analytics LOB leaders) and differentiated from competitors](https://fathom.video/share/Forkc9HWRKC9u6urFoT7GLsXcdKzg4nr?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [Webinar integration and case study references are crucial for adding unique, proprietary insights to articles](https://fathom.video/share/Forkc9HWRKC9u6urFoT7GLsXcdKzg4nr?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
  - [The goal is to produce articles that balance SEO requirements with deep, leadership-focused content in 1,500-2,000 words](https://fathom.video/share/Forkc9HWRKC9u6urFoT7GLsXcdKzg4nr?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)

## Topics

### Content Creation Workflow

  - [Start with Airtable for article details and keywords](https://fathom.video/share/Forkc9HWRKC9u6urFoT7GLsXcdKzg4nr?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)
  - [Use Perplexity for initial SEO-focused outline](https://fathom.video/share/Forkc9HWRKC9u6urFoT7GLsXcdKzg4nr?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [Leverage Claude to refine outline and connect to target audience pain points](https://fathom.video/share/Forkc9HWRKC9u6urFoT7GLsXcdKzg4nr?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Integrate webinar content for proprietary insights](https://fathom.video/share/Forkc9HWRKC9u6urFoT7GLsXcdKzg4nr?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)
  - [Aim for 60-90 minutes total time per article, with 45-60 minutes on research and outlining](https://fathom.video/share/Forkc9HWRKC9u6urFoT7GLsXcdKzg4nr?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)

### Target Audience Focus

  - [Primary focus on data platform leaders and analytics line of business leaders](https://fathom.video/share/Forkc9HWRKC9u6urFoT7GLsXcdKzg4nr?tab=summary&timestamp=2330.0)
  - [Avoid targeting data engineers or business analysts unless specifically relevant](https://fathom.video/share/Forkc9HWRKC9u6urFoT7GLsXcdKzg4nr?tab=summary&timestamp=2335.0)
  - [Connect content to leadership challenges and decision-making, not technical details](https://fathom.video/share/Forkc9HWRKC9u6urFoT7GLsXcdKzg4nr?tab=summary&timestamp=2350.0)

### Differentiation Strategy

  - [Use webinar content to add unique insights and language (e.g., "Blocked and Backlogged, Enabled with Anarchy")](https://fathom.video/share/Forkc9HWRKC9u6urFoT7GLsXcdKzg4nr?tab=summary&timestamp=2949.0)
  - [Reference case studies (e.g., Amgen) to provide real-world examples without direct promotion](https://fathom.video/share/Forkc9HWRKC9u6urFoT7GLsXcdKzg4nr?tab=summary&timestamp=3009.0)
  - [Balance SEO requirements with leadership-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/Forkc9HWRKC9u6urFoT7GLsXcdKzg4nr?tab=summary&timestamp=3479.0)

### Prophecy's Value Proposition

  - [Position Prophecy as enabling governed self-service data access](https://fathom.video/share/Forkc9HWRKC9u6urFoT7GLsXcdKzg4nr?tab=summary&timestamp=3102.0)
  - [Highlight how it bridges the gap between Databricks' data organization and user-friendly data retrieval](https://fathom.video/share/Forkc9HWRKC9u6urFoT7GLsXcdKzg4nr?tab=summary&timestamp=3191.0)
  - [Emphasize the balance between self-service capabilities and maintaining data governance](https://fathom.video/share/Forkc9HWRKC9u6urFoT7GLsXcdKzg4nr?tab=summary&timestamp=3197.0)

### SEO and Content Structure

  - [Include basic definitional sections for SEO (e.g., "What is data accuracy?")](https://fathom.video/share/Forkc9HWRKC9u6urFoT7GLsXcdKzg4nr?tab=summary&timestamp=2395.0)
  - [Use comparison tables (e.g., data accuracy vs. integrity vs. completeness)](https://fathom.video/share/Forkc9HWRKC9u6urFoT7GLsXcdKzg4nr?tab=summary&timestamp=2623.0)
  - [Adjust section titles to be more SEO-friendly while maintaining leadership focus](https://fathom.video/share/Forkc9HWRKC9u6urFoT7GLsXcdKzg4nr?tab=summary&timestamp=2707.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Saskia to set up and learn Ismail's Gemini process for webinar content integration](https://fathom.video/share/Forkc9HWRKC9u6urFoT7GLsXcdKzg4nr?tab=summary&timestamp=3945.0)
  - [Review the process with Ismail to ensure alignment and incorporate any specific requirements](https://fathom.video/share/Forkc9HWRKC9u6urFoT7GLsXcdKzg4nr?tab=summary&timestamp=3960.0)
  - [Aim to complete 2 articles tomorrow and potentially the third on Monday, pending Ismail's approval](https://fathom.video/share/Forkc9HWRKC9u6urFoT7GLsXcdKzg4nr?tab=summary&timestamp=3950.0)
  - [Submit completed articles in the designated channel for review, following Ismail's format](https://fathom.video/share/Forkc9HWRKC9u6urFoT7GLsXcdKzg4nr?tab=summary&timestamp=4080.0)
